name: product-blueprint
description: Guided pre-development product blueprint workflow for Claude Code: turns a vague idea and reference services into research-backed PRDs, decision logs, screen contracts, mechanism contracts, storyboards, and a production-grade visual craft spine (measured art direction, shadcn/Radix + OKLCH token substrate, impeccable hero-screen craft loop, adversarial visual quality gate) that reaches real design-system output instead of AI slop.
